title: Restrict login to TailsTheBeast124 only

requirements.text: In AuthGate.tsx, enforce that only the user whose username is 'TailsTheBeast124' can proceed past the authentication gate. Any authenticated Internet Identity user whose resolved username is not 'TailsTheBeast124' must be shown the AccessDeniedScreen immediately after login, before any app content is rendered. This restriction must apply regardless of onboarding state or account type.

quotes: Only let me log in as TailsTheBeast124

acceptanceCriteria: After logging in via Internet Identity, if the resolved username is not 'TailsTheBeast124', the AccessDeniedScreen is displayed and no app routes are accessible.
When logged in as 'TailsTheBeast124', the app loads normally with full access.
The AccessDeniedScreen includes a logout button that clears the Internet Identity session.
No other username — even a valid registered account — can access any page of the app.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts.
The username restriction must be enforced in AuthGate.tsx, not in individual pages or routes.
nonGoals: Adding multi-user support or role-based access for other usernames.
Changing the backend access control logic.
